title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Exports `parseListOptionsSelector` as a public function from `public/app/features/apiserver/client.ts`
1.2: `ScopedResourceClient` delegates to the exported `parseListOptionsSelector` instead of using a private duplicate
1.3: Adds a `ListApiArg` interface in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/types.ts` that extends `ListOptions` and adds optional watch-related list parameters
1.4: Adds a `RequestArg` interface in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/types.ts` with `name: string` and optional `ref` field
1.5: Adds a `GetRequestArg` interface in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/types.ts` that extends `RequestArg` with a required `path` field
1.6: Updates the `JobSpec` type in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/types.ts` to narrow the `action` field and extend it with commit metadata fields
1.7: Adds `FileRef` and `CommitInfo` types to `public/app/features/provisioning/api/types.ts` for commit metadata
1.8: Adds a `WebhookResponse` type to `public/app/features/provisioning/api/types.ts`
1.9: Adds a `listJobs` RTK Query endpoint in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/endpoints.ts` that accepts optional list parameters and wires selectors through `parseListOptionsSelector`
1.10: Adds a `listRepository` RTK Query endpoint in `endpoints.ts` that accepts optional list parameters with selector encoding
1.11: Adds a `getJob` RTK Query endpoint in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/endpoints.ts` that fetches a single job resource by name
1.12: Adds a `getRepository` RTK Query endpoint in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/endpoints.ts` that fetches a single repository resource by name
1.13: Adds a `listRepositoryHistory` RTK Query endpoint in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/endpoints.ts` that forwards `ref` as a query parameter
1.14: Adds a `getRepositoryHistory` RTK Query endpoint in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/endpoints.ts` that includes the file path segment in the URL
1.15: Adds a `deleteRepositoryFiles` RTK Query mutation in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/endpoints.ts` that passes `ref` and `message` as query parameters on DELETE
1.16: Adds a `getRepositoryWebhook` RTK Query endpoint in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/endpoints.ts` targeting the webhook route via GET
1.17: Adds a `postRepositoryWebhook` RTK Query mutation in `public/app/features/provisioning/api/endpoints.ts` targeting the webhook route via POST
1.18: Replaces the hand-rolled `ScopedResourceClient` usage in `RepositoryStatusPage.tsx` with RTK Query hooks from the provisioning API
1.19: `RepositoryStatusPage.tsx` preserves loading, error, and empty states when using RTK Query hooks
2: Documentation Maintainability
3: Artifact Cleanup
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Removes or renames existing public exports from `public/app/features/apiserver/client.ts` that other call sites depend on
4.2: Inlined selector serialization logic inside endpoint definitions in `endpoints.ts` instead of importing `parseListOptionsSelector` from `client.ts`
